---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/sarem_seitz
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sarem-seitz-647732134/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/SaremS

---

About this blog
